channel.title: Stanley Druckenmiller — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: TRIMMED NVDA (-25%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) trimmed NVDA in Q4 2025 · 8.6% of portfolio. Continuing to trim the NVDA home run. Taking profits.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED COHR (+22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added COHR in Q4 2025 · 8.3% of portfolio. Building Coherent further — optical networking.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED PLTR (+45%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added PLTR in Q4 2025 · 4.1% of portfolio. Bigger Palantir position — AI software thesis.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: TRIMMED MSFT (-10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) trimmed MSFT in Q4 2025 · 8.2% of portfolio. Partial Microsoft trim.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED AMZN (+92%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added AMZN (Amazon Com Inc) in Q4 2025 · 4.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: TRIMMED TSM (-29%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) trimmed TSM (Taiwan Semiconductor Mfg Ltd) in Q4 2025 · 3.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED GOOGL (+277%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added GOOGL (Alphabet Inc) in Q4 2025 · 2.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED SEA (+244%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added SEA (Sea Ltd) in Q4 2025 · 2.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: TRIMMED IVV (-47%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) trimmed IVV (Ishares Tr) in Q4 2025 · 2.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED QSR (+7%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added QSR (Restaurant Brands Intl Inc) in Q4 2025 · 1.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: NEW POSITION ALCOA (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) new position ALCOA (Alcoa Corp) in Q4 2025 · 1.6% of portfolio.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: TRIMMED ROKU (-29%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) trimmed ROKU (Roku Inc) in Q4 2025 · 1.4% of portfolio.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED CRH (+21%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added CRH (Crh Plc) in Q4 2025 · 1.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: NEW POSITION DELL (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) new position DELL (Delta Air Lines Inc Del) in Q4 2025 · 1.0% of portfolio.

item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) new position GS (Goldman Sachs Group Inc) in Q4 2025 · 0.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: TRIMMED NVDA (-18%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) trimmed NVDA in Q3 2025 · 11.4% of portfolio. First NVDA profit-take round.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED COHR (+30%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added COHR in Q3 2025 · 6.8% of portfolio. Added to Coherent.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED TSM (+15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added TSM in Q3 2025 · 5.2% of portfolio. More Taiwan Semi — AI picks and shovels.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: NEW POSITION ARM · Q3 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) new position ARM in Q3 2025 · 3.2% of portfolio. New ARM Holdings position.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: NEW POSITION PLTR · Q3 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) new position PLTR in Q3 2025 · 2.8% of portfolio. New Palantir — AI software thesis.

item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added IVV (Ishares Tr) in Q3 2025 · 3.8% of portfolio.

item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) new position AMZN (Amazon Com Inc) in Q3 2025 · 2.4% of portfolio.

item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) trimmed ROKU (Roku Inc) in Q3 2025 · 2.0% of portfolio.
